headline: Brown-Forman (BF-B) Downgraded to ‘Market Perform’
summary: Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) is included among the 13 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now. Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) is a major player in the global spirits industry that engages in the production and distribution of alcoholic beverages. Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) had a setback on March 9 when Bernstein downgraded the stock from ‘Outperform’ to ‘Market Perform’, […]

headline: Is There Now an Opportunity in Brown Forman (BF.B) After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Brown-Forman shares are starting to look mispriced, or if the recent weakness is justified by the fundamentals, this is a good place to start by focusing on valuation first. The stock last closed at US$24.22, with returns of a 7.8% decline over 7 days, a 17.8% decline over 30 days, a 7.3% decline year to date, a 26.8% decline over 1 year, a 58.1% decline over 3 years, and a 62.6% decline over 5 years.
